title: Family Dinner Takeout in Cedar Rapids | Captains Fish and Chicken
headline: Feed the Whole Family Fresh Fish and Fried Chicken Tonight
body: When it's your turn to feed the crew and nobody wants to cook, Captains Fish and Chicken on 1st Avenue NE makes family dinner easy. Everything is fried fresh to order, so the golden catfish, juicy fried chicken, and crispy tenders show up hot instead of tired. Our family meals and combos are built to stretch across a hungry table without anyone reaching for the last piece too soon. Pair a family deal with a stack of sides, add a couple of kids meals for the little ones, and dinner is handled. Cedar Rapids families in the Northeast neighborhood and nearby Marion order from us because it tastes homemade but skips the mess. Call (319) 221-1040 to order ahead for pickup, or have it delivered through DoorDash, Uber Eats, or Grubhub. Owner Ray Aqel opened Captains in 2024 with one promise that still holds: fish, chicken and seafood made fresh to order, every single time. Rated 4.4 on Google, we're the weeknight answer when everyone's hungry and the clock is not on your side.

faqs.question: How many people does a family meal feed?
faqs.answer: Our family meals and combos are portioned for a hungry household. A single family deal comfortably covers a family of four, and the three-item combo stretches further for larger groups. If you're feeding five or more, ask about our fish family deals when you call (319) 221-1040 and we'll help you size the order.

faqs.question: How do I order family dinner for pickup?
faqs.answer: The easiest way is to call (319) 221-1040 and order ahead. Since everything is fried fresh to order, calling gives the kitchen time to have your dinner hot and bagged when you arrive at 1616 1st Ave NE.

faqs.question: Can I get family dinner delivered?
faqs.answer: Yes. We deliver through DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Grubhub. Open your preferred app, search for Captains Fish and Chicken, and build your order. Delivery times and fees are set by each app.

faqs.question: Do you have options for kids?
faqs.answer: We do. Our kids meals are sized right for smaller appetites, so you can add one or two alongside the family deal and keep everyone at the table happy.

faqs.question: Should I call ahead for a big family order?
faqs.answer: Yes, please call ahead for larger orders. A quick call to (319) 221-1040 lets us prep everything fresh and have it ready at your pickup time instead of making you wait.

title: Game Day Wings in Cedar Rapids | Captains Fish and Chicken
headline: Party Wings and Crispy Tenders for Every Game Day
body: Game day in Cedar Rapids hits different with a hot box of wings on the table. At Captains Fish and Chicken on 1st Avenue NE, our party wings are fried fresh to order and built for the couch crowd, so you get that shattering crunch instead of soggy delivery wings that showed up cold. Feeding a full watch party? Stack party wings with whole wings, throw in some boneless chicken bites for the folks who want it easy, and load up on sides like fries so nobody's left snacking on air at halftime. It's the kind of spread that keeps the room loud for all four quarters. We fry to order, so plan your kickoff and call (319) 221-1040 to lock in a pickup time, or send it straight to your door through DoorDash, Uber Eats, or Grubhub. Captains opened in 2024 under owner Ray Aqel and is rated 4.4 on Google, with a simple promise behind every basket: fish, chicken and seafood made fresh to order. Whether it's a two-person matchup or a house full of fans in Northeast Cedar Rapids or Marion, we've got the wings to carry the game.

faqs.question: How many wings should I order for a watch party?
faqs.answer: A good rule of thumb is 6 to 8 wings per person for a group that's making wings the main event, or 4 to 5 if you're also serving tenders and sides. For a crowd of eight to ten, ordering party wings plus a 10pc whole wings meal keeps everyone fed. Call (319) 221-1040 and we'll help you size it.

faqs.question: How do I order wings for game day?
faqs.answer: Call (319) 221-1040 and order ahead so we can time your wings to your kickoff. Everything is fried fresh to order, so a heads-up call means hot wings ready right when you need them at 1616 1st Ave NE.

faqs.question: Can you deliver wings to my party?
faqs.answer: Yes. We're on DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Grubhub. Search Captains Fish and Chicken in your app and order for delivery. Each app sets its own delivery times and fees.

faqs.question: Do you have boneless options for the group?
faqs.answer: We do. Our boneless chicken bites and chicken tenders are great for guests who'd rather skip the bone, and they round out a wing spread nicely.

faqs.question: Should I call ahead for a large wing order?
faqs.answer: Yes. For a big game-day order, calling (319) 221-1040 ahead of time lets the kitchen fry everything fresh and have it bagged hot at your pickup time instead of during the rush.

title: Office and Party Catering in Cedar Rapids | Captains Fish and Chicken
headline: Fish Family Deals, Party Wings, and Pans to Feed the Whole Room
body: Catering a Cedar Rapids office lunch, a birthday, or a full-blown party? Captains Fish and Chicken on 1st Avenue NE feeds a crowd without cutting corners. Our fish family deals scale from a 10-piece all the way up to a 50-piece, so whether it's a small team meeting or a packed backyard, there's a size that fits. Add party wings by the batch, drop in a couple of nugget pans, and round it out with big sides, and you've got a spread that keeps a room full of people happy. Everything is fried fresh to order, which means it arrives crisp and hot, not sitting in steam. Owner Ray Aqel built Captains in 2024 on one idea, and it holds up at scale: fish, chicken and seafood made fresh to order, rated 4.4 on Google. Because larger orders take real kitchen time, always call ahead at (319) 221-1040 so we can prep your catering fresh and have it ready at your pickup time. Prefer delivery for smaller catering orders? We're on DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Grubhub. Serving Northeast Cedar Rapids, Marion, and everywhere in between, we make big-group ordering simple.

faqs.question: How many people does a 50-piece fish family deal feed?
faqs.answer: A 50-piece fish family deal generally serves around 15 to 20 people as a main dish, especially when paired with sides. For a smaller group of six to eight, the 10-piece fish family deal is a better fit. Call (319) 221-1040 and tell us your headcount and we'll recommend the right size.

faqs.question: What should I order to cater an office lunch for 20?
faqs.answer: For about 20 people, a 50-piece fish family deal plus a batch or two of party wings and a couple of large sides usually does it. If some of your group prefers chicken, add a three-item family combo. Call (319) 221-1040 and we'll build the order to your headcount.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I call for catering?
faqs.answer: For large catering orders, please call (319) 221-1040 as early as you can, at minimum several hours ahead and more for very big orders. Since everything is fried fresh to order, advance notice lets us prep it fresh and have it ready at your scheduled pickup time at 1616 1st Ave NE.

faqs.answer: For catering, call (319) 221-1040 directly. Phone ordering lets us confirm quantities, timing, and pickup for large orders. Smaller catering orders can also be placed for delivery through DoorDash, Uber Eats, or Grubhub.

faqs.question: Can catering be delivered?
faqs.answer: Smaller catering orders can be delivered through DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Grubhub, subject to each app's size limits and fees. For the largest fish family deals and pans, pickup at 1616 1st Ave NE is the most reliable option, and calling ahead ensures it's ready and fresh.

faqs.answer: Yes. Our nugget pans and fish family deals are made for feeding groups, and party wings can be added by the batch. Call (319) 221-1040 to combine pans, wings, and sides into one catering order sized to your party.

title: Friday Fish Fry in Cedar Rapids | Captains Fish and Chicken
headline: A Fresh Fish Fry Any Friday, All Year Round
body: You don't need a special season for a good fish fry. At Captains Fish and Chicken on 1st Avenue NE, we fry fresh fish to order every day of the year, so Friday night in Cedar Rapids always has an easy answer. Choose from fresh catfish fillet, perch, tilapia, or cod, all dropped crispy and golden and never left sitting under a heat lamp. Whether you want a single fillet with fries or a full fish family deal to cover the whole table, we've got the fry that satisfies. It's the kind of honest, fresh-cooked fish that keeps folks in Northeast Cedar Rapids and Marion coming back week after week. Because it's fried fresh to order, call (319) 221-1040 to order ahead for pickup and skip the wait, or have your fish fry delivered through DoorDash, Uber Eats, or Grubhub. Captains opened in 2024 under owner Ray Aqel with a straightforward promise: fish, chicken and seafood made fresh to order, and we're rated 4.4 on Google. Make it a standing Friday tradition, no occasion required.

title: Seafood Feast in Cedar Rapids | Captains Fish and Chicken

body: When you're in the mood to treat yourself, a seafood feast from Captains Fish and Chicken on 1st Avenue NE delivers. Start with jumbo shrimp fried to a golden crunch, add a couple of crab cakes packed with flavor, and go big with fresh red snapper or a crisp piece of cod. Everything is fried fresh to order, so the seafood arrives hot and crackling instead of steamed soft in a bag.
